title: SVNIT Centre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
short_info: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 2 Centre Assistant Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Graduate/Post Graduate in Commerce/Science/Business Administrative or related fields, Minimum 4-5 years relevant work experience, Knowledge of government initiatives in urban planning and development, Proficiency in Microsoft Office, statistical and simulation software, Good communication skills in English and local language qualif

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate in Commerce/Science/Business Administrative or related fields, Minimum 4-5 years relevant work experience, Knowledge of government initiatives in urban planning and development, Proficiency in Microsoft Office, statistical and simulation software, Good communication skills in English and local language
qualification.details: Centre Assistant (Senior): Graduate in Commerce/ Science/ Business Administrative or related fields and Post Graduate in Commerce/ Science/ Business Administrative or related fields from a recognized university. Minimum five (05) years of relevant work experience after completion of Post Graduate Degree. Knowledge and awareness of current initiatives of the government project, planning and development. Experience of working with government departments/ agencies, and other public stakeholders. Good communication skills in English and Local language (written and verbal). Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, statistical and simulation software. Ability to work well in multi-disciplinary teams, balance multiple priorities, and work under tight deadlines. Ability to understand the level of detail essential for a given task. Centre Assistant (Junior): Bachelor in Commerce / Business Administrative or related fields from a recognized university. Minimum four (04) years of relevant work experience. Knowledge and awareness of current initiatives of the government in urban planning and development. Good communication skills in English and Local language (written and verbal). Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, statistical and simulation software. Ability to work well in multi-disciplinary teams, balance multiple priorities, and work under tight deadlines. Ability to understand the level of detail essential for a given task.

salary_details.details: Centre Assistant (Senior): Rs. 40,000/- per month (Fixed with all Allowances) Centre Assistant (Junior): Rs. 30,000/- per month (Fixed with all Allowances)
